author: y4rr
content: ferrotorch-diffusion crate added (25th workspace member). Scope: VAE decoder only. ResnetBlock2D + AttnBlock2D + Upsample2D + 4-block decoder. GroupNorm(32) + SiLU + Conv2d throughout. PASS first-try: cosine_sim=1.0, max_abs=0.001 on deterministic latent (seed=42). Pinned to ferrotorch/sd-v1-5-vae-decoder (SHA 66b1c06d47c1). 22 lib tests. Next sub-dispatches: B.3b UNet, B.3c CLIP text encoder.
